subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1903-08-31
subcodes.first_line: Nothing causes me more unhappiness than disunity, and this can only be remedied by obedience to the command of the Universal House of Justice
subcodes.first_line_orig: هیچ چیز خاطر مرا پریشان نمی کند مگر اختلاف و چاره آن این است که جمیع احباء باید بامر بیت العدل
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @unity; oneness of humanity
